key_events: The Myeongnyang Battle scenario concludes successfully, with Lee Ji-Hae leading the Ghost Fleet to victory in under an hour.
Kim Dok-Ja receives "Sword Song Lv.1" from the Naval War God as a reward, an ability he notes Ji-Hae would typically acquire much later in the story.
Dok-Ja uses ampoules and coins to enhance his attributes, increasing Stamina (Lv.18 to Lv.24), Agility (Lv.15 to Lv.20), and Mana (Lv.10 to Lv.15).
The group proceeds to the Eighth Floor of the Cinema Dungeon, where they encounter Yu Joong-Hyuk.
Dok-Ja quickly realizes Yu Joong-Hyuk is not himself but a puppet controlled by the Cinema Master, who has revealed himself.
The controlled Yu Joong-Hyuk attacks Dok-Ja, damaging his reinforced protective suit with "Force Palm Lv.4".
Jung Hee-Won intervenes, activating "Demon Slayer Lv.2" to confront the manipulated Yu Joong-Hyuk, despite Dok-Ja's concern for her safety.
summary.character_updates: Kim Dok-Ja successfully navigates the Myeongnyang Battle, receiving the powerful 'Sword Song Lv.1' ability and significantly boosting his core attributes. He deduces the Cinema Master's control over Yu Joong-Hyuk and faces a direct threat from his former ally. Lee Ji-Hae overcomes her emotional distress, successfully leading the Ghost Fleet and completing the Myeongnyang Battle scenario in record time. Jung Hee-Won demonstrates her loyalty and courage by immediately engaging the Cinema Master-controlled Yu Joong-Hyuk to protect Dok-Ja, activating her 'Demon Slayer Lv.2' skill. Yu Joong-Hyuk appears on the Eighth Floor, but is revealed to be an 'empty shell,' a puppet of the Cinema Master, attacking Dok-Ja and his companions with his skills.
summary.lore_and_worldbuilding: The 'Cinema Master' is confirmed as the primary antagonist of the Cinema Dungeon, capable of manipulating powerful individuals like Yu Joong-Hyuk into puppets. The concept of 'Final Credits' marks the completion of specific stages within the Cinema Dungeon. Constellations (specifically the Naval War God) can bestow unique and powerful abilities as scenario completion rewards, sometimes granting them earlier than expected in the original storyline.
summary.ending_cliffhanger: Jung Hee-Won bravely confronts the Cinema Master-controlled Yu Joong-Hyuk, initiating a perilous battle against their manipulated ally, leaving her ability to withstand his power uncertain and the group in a critical situation.
